title: Accounts
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account? All transactions associated with this account will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
archiveConfirm: Archive this account? It will be removed from active totals but its history will be preserved.

form.name: Account Name
form.creditDetailsDescription: Track limit, utilization, and monthly statement timing.

subtitle: Balance overview

history.empty: First snapshot recorded. Come back tomorrow for trend data.
history.none: No history yet. Balance is recorded daily.

empty.title: No accounts yet
empty.description: Add your first account to start tracking your finances.

noActive.title: No active accounts
noActive.description: Your active totals are clear. Restore an archived account or add a new one to start tracking again.

archived.title: Archived Accounts
archived.description: Closed or retired accounts stay here without affecting active totals.
